name: Hand Demo
camera_block: product-focused framing with hands visible, smooth hand movement, controlled motion, steady but natural not tripod-still, close-up on product and hands
motion_block: clear controlled product handling, natural finger positioning on product, deliberate purposeful motions, realistic grip not stiff or robotic
performance_block: slow enough pacing to see action clearly, brief pauses to show result, satisfying rhythmic motion, focused attentive to product, subtle satisfaction at result
platform_block: authentic product demo, not polished commercial, organic UGC pacing
audio_block: subtle product handling sounds, fabric brushing sounds, quiet room tone
negative_prompt_block: no robotic movement, no stiff hands, no unnatural grip, no overproduced commercial demo, no cinematic lighting
